description_long: This object is a vintage television set with a boxy, rectangular form and a woodgrain-patterned exterior. The front features a convex glass screen displaying a color test pattern, flanked by two large, metallic rotary dials on the right side. The back panel is black and contains various input/output ports, labels, and ventilation grilles, typical of older analog electronics. The sides and top are uniformly covered in a reddish-brown wood texture, giving it a classic, retro appearance. The object stands on four small, black feet, slightly elevating it from the ground. Its overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century consumer electronics, blending utilitarian function with decorative wood paneling.
description: A retro television set with a woodgrain exterior, convex glass screen, and metallic dials, standing on four black feet.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the woodgrain texture with no visible controls or screen, highlighting the boxy shape.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals a black panel with multiple ports, labels, and ventilation grilles, contrasting with the woodgrain top.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying only the woodgrain surface and the geometric form.
description_view_3: The front view features the convex glass screen with a color test pattern and two metallic rotary dials on the right.
